title: senna longiracemosa
intro: Senna longiracemosa is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, commonly known as a type of senna plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative and anthelmintic properties, which have been used to treat constipation and parasitic worm infections. The health benefits of Senna longiracemosa include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Senna longiracemosa is often prepared as a tea or capsule for internal use, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
